message:
chore: remove fuzz/target/ from git and update .gitignore

Build artifacts from cargo-fuzz were accidentally committed. This removes
them from tracking and adds fuzz/target/ to .gitignore to prevent future
accidental commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
